reasoning: The control requires establishing and maintaining baseline configurations and inventories, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that configurations and inventories of resources like pods and nodes are maintained and audited. Kubernetes supports labeling and annotating resources, which can be used to maintain inventories. Additionally, baseline configurations can be enforced through policies and changes can be logged using audit logs.
title: 3_4_1: 3.4.1 Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems (including hardware, software, firmware, and documentation) throughout the respective system development life cycles
